name: Creamy Crunchy Chicken and Rice Bake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Combine melted cheese, cooked rice, cooked chicken, peas, and half of the onion rings in a 2-quart casserole dish.
3. Bake for 20 minutes.
4. Top with remaining onion rings.
5. Bake for an additional 5 minutes.
